title: These Roots Are Made For Walking
company: Sarah Waters’ Tipping the Velvet, "She" explores the beauty and risks of queer love during WWII. "Lesbians Eat Fire" follows Joanne, a fictional character created from the lived experiences of the Lesbian Avengers and lesbian activists from the early 1990s.
description: She - Written and performed by Emily WollenbergEye of Dawn - Written and performed by Isabel HeesLesbians Eat Fire - Written and performed by Caro VindenProducers: Emily Wollenberg, Isabel Hees, Caro Vinden, Taylor Carmen, Cristiano Benfenati Venues:Grania Dean Studio (Lantern Theatre @ ACT) Grania Dean Studio (Lantern Theatre @ ACT) Grania Dean Studio (Lantern Theatre @ ACT)
